problem id: 0c88a3dc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  00101111 -> 01011110
  01010100 -> 10101001
  00011101 -> 00111010
  00101011 -> 01010110
  10010010 -> 00100110
  11111100 -> 11111011
  00000101 -> 00001010
  11011001 -> 10110001

query: 01000101
predicted answer: 10001011
